features: Provides the complexion with a smooth, matte finish with medium to high coverage for up to 16 hours
Super-soft texture without silicones & microplastics, oil-free, paraben-free & alcohol-free
longlasting, mattifying, colour correcting, oil-control/ shine-control, instant result, soft focus, matte
We say no to animal testing Cosnova is listed internationally with essence and CATRICE at both PETA Germany and PETA
description: Product Description STAY ALL DAY 16H FOUNDATION The popular Stay All Day 16H Foundation gets a very special upgrade, because its formulation has been completely revised! From now on, it is free from silicones, parabens, microplastic particles, alcohol, perfume and oil - all with consistent performance that has convinced consumers for many years and at the same unbeatable price. The foundation in a high-quality glass bottle has a super soft texture, gives the complexion an even, smooth look for up to 16 hours and allows medium to high coverage. It is also water, mask and transfer proof. Benefits Colour correcting Long-lasting Matting The right application Shake well before use. Then put some of the STAY ALL DAY 16H FOUNDATION on your back of your hand and apply it to your nose area first with a brush, a sponge or two fingers. Work from the inside out, so blend the product to the hairline. Save the eye and mouth area to achieve the best and most natural finish. For an even result, the foundation should be applied in circular motions. Make sure that you blend the product well towards the neck so that there are no unsightly make-up edges. Tip: Start with little product and work up layer by layer to your optimal coverage. You could also like this HELLO, GOOD STUFF! FACE PRIMER All about matte. fixing comp.
